title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow Once
scenario: Find My Device location permission flow shows redundant permission prompts after granting with "Ask Next Time" setting
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and complete onboarding, selecting "Don't Allow" when prompted for location permission.
2. From the Home screen, tap Find My Device.
3. Observe the location permission prompt that appears with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options.
5. Observe that the app navigates to the phone's system settings for location permissions.
6. In system settings, grant location permission with the option "Ask Next Time or When I Share".
7. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Observe the dialogue that appears titled "Allow Poly Lens to use your location" with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", and "Don't Allow".
expected: After granting location permission with "Ask Next Time or When I Share" and returning to the app, the "Allow Poly Lens to use your location" dialogue should appear with the three options: "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", and "Don't Allow".
